name: Cheese Onion Morsels
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the grated cheddar cheese and softened butter together.
2. Add the egg and water, mixing until well combined.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, salt, sugar, baking powder, and paprika.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the cheese mixture, stirring continuously.
5. Stir in the finely chopped onions and parsley (or flakes).
6. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto a greased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
8. The morsels can be frozen and thawed later. To reheat, bake at 375°F for 5 minutes.
9. This recipe makes approximately 8 dozen cheese onion morsels.
